Man: The recruitment companies are setting higher and higher requirements, asking for a PhD, and they also want relevant work experience.

Man: I think so too, but they don't think that way.

en_trans.query: Who will go to request leave?

dialogue: 女：经理，我生病了，身体不太舒服，明天想请假可以吗?
男：好的，你明天不用来上班了，好好儿在家休息吧。
Woman: Manager, I'm sick and not feeling well. Can I take a day off tomorrow?
Man: Okay, you don't need to come to work tomorrow. Have a good rest at home.
en_trans.query: What will the woman do tomorrow?

dialogue: 女：到天安门广场还有几站?
男：五站。
女：这么远啊，北京真大。
男：别着急，我们可以欣赏一下儿风景。
Woman: How many stops are there to Tiananmen Square?
Man: Five stops.
Woman: It's so far, Beijing is really big.
Man: Don't worry, we can enjoy the scenery.
en_trans.query: What vehicle are they riding?

dialogue: 女：即使你忍不住，也不能表现得太明显。
男：可是这个老板说话太无聊了，我们没必要浪费时间。
zh_trans.query: 什么事情在浪费他们的时间?

dialogue: Woman: Even if you can't help it, you shouldn't make it too obvious.
Man: But this boss is so boring, we don't need to waste our time.
en_trans.query: What is wasting their time?

dialogue: 男：那场音乐会的票现在打9折，可是还是有点儿贵。
女：别担心，我们有学生证，可以打7折。
zh_trans.query: 他们可以买到几折的票?

dialogue: Man: The tickets for that concert are now at a 10% discount, but they are still a bit expensive.
Woman: Don't worry, we have student IDs and can get a 30% discount.
en_trans.query: What discount can they get on the tickets?

dialogue: 女：我老公就像我肚子里的蛔虫，什么他都知道。
男：那你就好好守着你的“蛔虫”吧。
Woman: My husband is like a worm in my belly, he knows everything about me.
Man: Then you should really take care of your 'worm'.
en_trans.query: What does the woman say about her husband?

dialogue: 女：要不是你把钱都买了股票，我们能落到这步田地吗?
男：这能赖我吗，都是经济危机闹的。
zh_trans.query: 从这个对话，我们可以知道什么?

dialogue: Woman: If you hadn't spent all the money on stocks, would we be in this predicament?
Man: Can you blame me? It's all because of the economic crisis.
en_trans.query: What can we learn from this dialogue?

dialogue: 男：天气预报说今天下午有大雨，但看现在的天气，不太可能啊!
女：天气预报很准的，你还是带上雨伞吧!
Man: The weather forecast says there will be heavy rain this afternoon, but looking at the current weather, it doesn't seem likely!
Woman: The weather forecast is very accurate, you'd better take an umbrella!
en_trans.query: What does the woman mean?

dialogue: 女：明天就考试了，你还在玩!
男：老师说推迟到下个星期了，不着急。
女：那也应该复习啊，今天都星期五了。
男：好了，我知道了，你真哕嗦!
zh_trans.query: 关于男的可以知道什么?

dialogue: Woman: The exam is tomorrow, and you're still playing!
Man: The teacher said it's postponed to next week, no rush.
Woman: You should still review, today is already Friday.
Man: Okay, I got it, you're so naggy!
en_trans.query: What can we know about the man?

dialogue: 女：你来得真及时，现在是6:25，还有5分钟就要开车了。
男：还得谢谢你啊，要不是你打电话叫醒我，我肯定误了这趟车。
Woman: You arrived just in time. It's 6:25 now, and the train will leave in 5 minutes.
Man: I really have to thank you. If you hadn't called to wake me up, I definitely would have missed this train.
en_trans.query: When does the train leave?

dialogue: 女：先生，这是你的登机牌吗?刚才掉地上了。
男：是的，谢谢你。还好被你看到了，丢了就麻烦了。
Woman: Sir, is this your boarding pass? It just fell to the ground.
Man: Yes, thank you. Luckily, you saw it. It would have been a problem if it was lost.
en_trans.query: What happened to the man just now?

dialogue: 男：我的手机哪儿去了?
女：没在桌子上吗?
男：没有啊，在你包里吗?
女：是，在我包里呢。
Man: Where did my phone go?
Woman: Isn't it on the table?
Man: No, is it in your bag?
Woman: Yes, it is in my bag.
en_trans.query: Where is the man's phone?

dialogue: 女：先生，给您菜单，您现在点菜吗?
男：再等两分钟，我还有个朋友没到。
Woman: Sir, here's the menu. Would you like to order now?
Man: Let's wait for another two minutes, I'm still waiting for a friend.
en_trans.query: Who is the man waiting for?

dialogue: 女：办这件事难度挺大，你看能办成吗?
男：除非老李出面。
Woman: It's quite difficult to handle this matter, do you think it can be done?
Man: Unless Old Li steps in.
en_trans.query: What does the man mean?
choices: Only if Old Li helps will it work
en_trans.gold: Only if Old Li helps will it work

dialogue: 男：你想买点儿什么?
女：请问有没有小孩儿穿的羽绒衣服?
男：有，最近我们进了很多款式的羽绒服。
女：拿一款保暖性能好点儿的。
男：这件让他试试。
女：其他地方都合适，就是颜色浅了点儿。
男：这款羽绒服深色的都卖完了，那你再让他试试这件吧。
女：这件颜色挺好的，但是有点儿瘦，有没有大一号的?
男：对不起，昨天刚卖完。明天还要进货，你再来看看吧?
女：好的，谢谢。
男：不客气。
zh_trans.query: 这两个人在什么地方谈话?

dialogue: Man: What do you want to buy?
Woman: Do you have any down jackets for children?
Man: Yes, we recently got many styles of down jackets.
Woman: Show me one with good warmth.
Man: Let him try this one.
Woman: Everything else is fine, but the color is a bit light.
Man: All the dark-colored down jackets are sold out, please let him try this one instead.
Woman: This color is nice, but it's a bit tight. Do you have a larger size?
Man: Sorry, they just sold out yesterday. We are getting more stock tomorrow, can you come back to check?
Woman: Okay, thank you.
Man: You're welcome.
en_trans.query: Where is the conversation taking place?

dialogue: 男：听说你们一家三口去游泳了?
女：女儿没去，就我和丈夫去了。
男：一个人大概花了多少钱?
女：不是很贵，每人20。
zh_trans.query: 女的和家人游泳一共花了多少钱?

dialogue: Man: I heard your family of three went swimming?
Woman: Our daughter didn't go, just my husband and I went.
Man: How much did it cost per person?
Woman: It wasn't very expensive, 20 each.
en_trans.query: How much did the woman and her family spend in total on swimming?

dialogue: 女：房屋出租广告?你看这个干什么?
男：我下个月要搬家，得赶快找房子。
女：搬家?为什么?
男：房东给我打电话了，他要卖房子。
Woman: House rental advertisement? Why are you looking at this?
Man: I'm moving next month, so I need to quickly find a house.
Woman: Moving? Why?
Man: The landlord called me; he wants to sell the house.
en_trans.query: What is the man looking at?

dialogue: 女：我跟张梅的关系没得说，我去找她，她准同意。
男：那这件事就好办了。
zh_trans.query: 关于张梅，我们可以知道什么?

dialogue: Woman: My relationship with Zhang Mei is beyond words. If I go to her, she will definitely agree.
Man: Then this matter will be easy to handle.
en_trans.query: What can we know about Zhang Mei?
choices: Is a good friend of the woman
en_trans.gold: Is a good friend of the woman

dialogue: 男：王姐，你能帮我们公司介绍几个外国客户吗?
女：没问题，我做出口生意这么多年，找几个外国人还不容易!
Man: Sister Wang, can you help our company introduce a few foreign clients?
Woman: No problem, I've been in the export business for so many years, finding a few foreigners is not difficult at all!
en_trans.query: What is the most likely occupation of the woman?

dialogue: 男：你父亲退休后做什么?
女：年轻时爱好游泳、滑冰，老了喜欢读书了。
zh_trans.query: 女的的父亲现在喜欢做什么?

dialogue: Man: What does your father do after retirement?
Woman: When he was young, he loved swimming and skating, but now that he's older, he enjoys reading.
en_trans.query: What does the woman's father like to do now?

dialogue: 男：您好，我是来应聘的，请问需要哪些材料?
女：请让我看一下你的简历、毕业证书和推荐信。
zh_trans.query: 根据对话，应聘时哪个材料不需要?

dialogue: Man: Hello, I am here to apply for a job. What materials do I need to provide?
Woman: Please let me see your resume, diploma, and recommendation letter.
en_trans.query: According to the dialogue, which material is not needed for the job application?

dialogue: 男：对不起，路上堵车我迟到了!
女：还以为你不来了，我都等你半天了。
Man: Sorry, I was late because of traffic!
Woman: I thought you weren't coming. I've been waiting for you for a long time.
en_trans.query: What does the woman mean?
choices: Waited for you for a long time
en_trans.gold: Waited for you for a long time

dialogue: 男：逃避解决不了问题，你得勇敢地去面对。
女：您说得对，我会正视这个问题的，谢谢。
Man: Escaping won't solve the problem, you have to face it bravely.
Woman: You're right, I will face this problem squarely, thank you.
en_trans.query: What does the man suggest the woman to do?

dialogue: 男：真臭。到处都是垃圾!
女：所以你不应该乱扔垃圾呀!
zh_trans.query: 女的对男的态度怎么样?

dialogue: Man: It really stinks. There's garbage everywhere!
Woman: That's why you shouldn't litter!
en_trans.query: What is the woman's attitude towards the man?

dialogue: 女：申请表我已经填好了，怎么给您呢?是寄给您吗?
男：不用寄，传真给我就可以。
Woman: I have already filled out the application form, how should I send it to you? Should I mail it to you?
Man: No need to mail it, just fax it to me.
en_trans.query: What does the man mean?

dialogue: 女：你准备好了没，准备好了我们就出发吧!
男：马上就好。对了，我们怎么过去啊?
女：我们坐公交车去吧，要不就先走一段再坐地铁过去。
男：坐公交和地铁的人太多了，大夏天的多热啊，我看还是打车过去算了!
Woman: Are you ready? If you are, let's head out!
Man: I'll be ready soon. By the way, how are we getting there?
Woman: Let's take the bus, or we could walk a bit and then take the subway.
Man: There are too many people on the bus and subway, and it's too hot in the summer. I think we should just take a taxi!
en_trans.query: How does the man want to go?

dialogue: 男：真是的，每次他都要迟到，下次再不想跟他出来了。
女：估计她是有事情耽搁了吧。
Man: Really, he is late every single time. I don't want to go out with him again next time.
Woman: Maybe he was held up by something.
en_trans.query: What is the man's current mood?

dialogue: 男：昨天下午的演出怎么样？
女：你没有和我一起去看真是太可惜了。
Man: How was the performance yesterday afternoon?
Woman: It's a pity you couldn't come with me to see it.
en_trans.query: What does the woman think about the performance?

dialogue: 女：老刘，看你这么高兴，是不是遇到了什么喜事啊?
男：我女儿考上大学了，今天的午饭我请了。
Woman: Old Liu, you look so happy, did something good happen?
Man: My daughter got into college, today's lunch is on me.
en_trans.query: Why is Old Liu happy?
choices: The woman invited him to lunch

dialogue: 男：张老师，我有几个问题想问您一下。
女：真不好意思，我等会儿还有两节课。
男：那您别的时间有空儿吗?
女：有，周三下午我在办公楼124房间，你可以到时候来找我。
zh_trans.query: 男的应该什么时候去找张老师?

dialogue: Man: Teacher Zhang, I have a few questions I'd like to ask you.
Woman: I'm really sorry, I have two classes later.
Man: Then do you have free time at another time?
Woman: Yes, on Wednesday afternoon I am in room 124 of the office building, you can come find me then.
en_trans.query: When should the man go to find Teacher Zhang?

dialogue: 男：今天早上吃什么啊?
女：我刚才出去买了几个菜包，赶紧趁热吃吧，冷了就不好吃了。
男：这菜包的味道真不错，是不是张记的?
女：就是那家的，他们的包子口味很独特，每次都要排队等呢。
Man: What are we having for breakfast this morning?
Woman: I just went out to buy some vegetable buns. Eat them while they are hot, they don't taste as good when they are cold.
Man: These vegetable buns taste really good. Are they from Zhang's?
Woman: Yes, they are from that place. Their buns have a unique flavor, and there’s always a queue waiting for them.
en_trans.query: How are the vegetable buns from Zhang’s?

dialogue: 女：小张，你知道中国银行什么时候下班吗?
男：五点半吧。
女：正好我们下班还有半个小时的时间，我要去取点儿钱。
男：离我们医院最近的一个就在杭州大学旁边。
Woman: Xiao Zhang, do you know when the Bank of China closes?
Man: Around half past five.
Woman: It's just right, we still have half an hour after work. I want to withdraw some money.
Man: The nearest one to our hospital is next to Hangzhou University.
en_trans.query: Where does the woman want to go?

dialogue: 男：听说你儿子在这次全国演讲比赛中得了冠军，是真的吗?
女：对，那是他自己刻苦努力取得的成绩。我很为他感到骄傲。
Man: I heard your son won the championship in this national speech contest, is it true?
Woman: Yes, that is the result of his own hard work and effort. I am very proud of him.
en_trans.query: What is the woman's mood?

dialogue: 男：中国菜的特点是色香味俱全。
女：色香味俱全是什么意思?
男：就是颜色很漂亮、香味很浓、味道很美，这三种缺一不可。
女：那你最喜欢哪一种?
男：我好色，颜色好看才让人想吃嘛。
Man: The characteristic of Chinese cuisine is that it is a perfect combination of color, aroma, and taste.
Woman: What does a perfect combination of color, aroma, and taste mean?
Man: It means the color is beautiful, the aroma is strong, and the taste is delicious; these three cannot be lacking.
Woman: Then which one do you like the most?
Man: I'm fond of color, as a good appearance makes you want to eat.
en_trans.query: What are they discussing?

dialogue: 男：你今晚有什么安排?
女：没有，你有什么好的建议吗?
男：我听说公园里今天晚上有一场演出，我正好有两张票，你有兴趣吗?
女：好啊，我很喜欢看演出。都有些什么节目呢?
男：有歌舞、小品，还有京剧。
女：是吗?太好了!我五点四十下课，我们六点一刻在学校门口见面。
男：好，不见不散!
Man: What plans do you have for tonight?
Woman: Nothing, do you have any good suggestions?
Man: I heard there's a performance in the park tonight, and I happen to have two tickets. Are you interested?
Woman: Sure, I really enjoy watching performances. What kind of programs do they have?
Man: There are songs and dances, skits, and also Beijing opera.
Woman: Really? That's great! I finish class at 5:40, let's meet at the school gate at 6:15.
Man: Okay, see you there!
en_trans.query: What time are they meeting at the gate?

dialogue: 男：你怎么突然开始关心体育了？
女：我的男朋友喜欢看足球比赛，是他影响了我。
Man: Why did you suddenly start caring about sports?
Woman: My boyfriend likes to watch football matches, he influenced me.
en_trans.query: What does the woman mainly mean?

dialogue: 男：这次比赛你们班怎么样?
女：差一点就输了，比赛的时候我正好有事没去看，据说很精彩。
Man: How did your class do in the competition this time?
Woman: We almost lost. I happened to have something to do and didn't watch the competition, but I heard it was very exciting.
en_trans.query: How was the competition?

dialogue: 男：东西都收拾好了吗?
女：收拾好了，但是我们的身份证不知道被我塞到哪里了。
男：这么重要的东西你竟然不小心存放!
女：我没把它弄丢，但就是不记得放在哪里了。
男：看看钱包，会不会在里面?
女：看了，不在。
男：会不会和机票放在一起了?
女：也看了，不在。
男：快，好好找找，出租车司机还在楼下等着我们呢!
女：好，别催，别催!我再认真找找，啊!找到了。
男：太好了，第一次出远门旅行你就制造紧张气氛。
女：没有经验嘛，以后就好了。快走吧!
zh_trans.query: 男的为什么要催促女士?

dialogue: Man: Have you packed everything?
Woman: Yes, I have packed everything, but I don't know where I put our ID cards.
Man: How could you carelessly store such important items?
Woman: I didn't lose them, I just don't remember where I put them.
Man: Check your wallet, could they be in there?
Woman: I checked, they're not there.
Man: Could they be with the plane tickets?
Woman: I checked, not there either.
Man: Hurry, look carefully, the taxi driver is still waiting for us downstairs!
Woman: Okay, stop rushing me! I'll look carefully again. Ah! Found them!
Man: Great, it's your first time traveling far and you created a tense atmosphere.
Woman: I'm inexperienced, it'll get better next time. Let's go!
en_trans.query: Why is the man urging the woman?
choices: The man has an urgent matter to attend to
The woman is taking too long
The woman has no sense of time

dialogue: 女：你们的表演非常精彩!
男：真的吗?
女：当然了，当时很多观众都激动地站起来鼓掌了。
男：谢谢您。
Woman: Your performance was wonderful!
Man: Really?
Woman: Of course, many in the audience stood up and applauded excitedly at the time.
Man: Thank you.
en_trans.query: What are they talking about?

dialogue: 男：这部电影让我想起了我第一次牵你手时的情景。
女：是啊，电影拍得很真实，把我带回了那个年代。
男：现代社会，那样单纯的爱情可能只能在电影里找了。
女：也不见得，大部分人的爱情还是很单纯的，只是社会更复杂了。
zh_trans.query: 根据对话，可以知道什么?

dialogue: Man: This movie reminds me of the time when I first held your hand.
Woman: Yes, the movie is very realistic and takes me back to that era.
Man: In modern society, such pure love might only be found in movies.
Woman: Not necessarily, most people's love is still very pure, it's just that society has become more complex.
en_trans.query: What can be known from the dialogue?
choices: They are in a romantic relationship
The woman is no longer pure

dialogue: 男：你喜欢参加旅行团还是喜欢自己去旅游?
女：后者更加吸引我。
choices: 参加旅行团和自己旅游都可以

dialogue: Man: Do you prefer joining a travel group or traveling on your own?
Woman: The latter is more appealing to me.
en_trans.query: What is the woman's attitude?
choices: Likes traveling with a travel group
Both joining a travel group and traveling on her own are fine

dialogue: 女：你怎么还没回来?忘了今天是爷爷的生日了?
男：没忘，可是这边的问题还没解决，回不去啊。
zh_trans.query: 关于男的，可以知道什么?

dialogue: Woman: Why haven't you come back yet? Did you forget that today is Grandpa's birthday?
Man: I haven't forgotten, but the problem here still isn't solved, I can't go back.
en_trans.query: What can be known about the man?
choices: Doesn't want to celebrate the birthday

dialogue: 男：我明天下午去你们公司附近开会，要不要接你下班？
女：不用，我下午送客人去机场，不在公司。
zh_trans.query: 女的为什么不让男的接她？

dialogue: Man: I'm going to a meeting near your company tomorrow afternoon. Do you want a ride after work?
Woman: No need, I'm taking a guest to the airport in the afternoon, so I won't be at the company.
en_trans.query: Why doesn't the woman want the man to pick her up?

dialogue: 男：你好!这里是肯德基宅急送。
女：你好，我想点一份香辣鸡腿汉堡套餐，现在有什么优惠活动吗?
男：有，现在买一份九珍果汁可以得两份，三公里内送餐费8元减半。
女：优惠不大嘛!算了，我还是问问麦当劳吧。
zh_trans.query: 肯德基现在的优惠活动是什么?

dialogue: Man: Hello! This is KFC delivery service.
Woman: Hello, I would like to order a spicy chicken burger meal. Are there any promotions right now?
Man: Yes, if you buy one Jiu Zhen juice, you can get two, and the delivery fee within three kilometers is half off from 8 yuan.
Woman: The promotion is not that great! Forget it, I'll check with McDonald's instead.
en_trans.query: What is KFC's current promotion?
choices: Buy one spicy chicken, get one free
Buy one Jiu Zhen juice, get one free
Buy one burger meal, get one free
en_trans.gold: Buy one Jiu Zhen juice, get one free

dialogue: 男：早点休息吧，明天再继续写。
女：不行啊，张教授要求我明天必须把这份材料交给他。
男：可是你的身体健康也很重要啊。
女：没办法，你先睡吧，我马上就写完了。
Man: Get some rest early, continue writing tomorrow.
Woman: I can't, Professor Zhang requires me to submit this material to him tomorrow.
Man: But your health is also very important.
Woman: There's no way, you go to sleep first, I'm almost finished.
en_trans.query: What is the woman doing?

dialogue: 男：明天我要和一个朋友一起去北海公园。
女：北海公园？我听说那里非常漂亮。
男：是很漂亮。和我们一起去吧？
女：明天我还要上课，周日才休息。
男：那我们就周日去吧，周日公园里更好玩儿。
zh_trans.query: 他们最有可能什么时候去北海公园？

dialogue: Man: Tomorrow I'm going to Beihai Park with a friend.

dialogue: Man: Hello, is this Sun Li?
Woman: Yes, may I ask who you are?
Man: I'm Wang Qiang. I heard you came to Changsha?
Woman: Wang Qiang, how did you know I came to Changsha? Are you also in Changsha?
Man: Yes, I heard from a friend that you came to Changsha, so I called you.
Woman: Are you working in Changsha or?
Man: I got into graduate school and I am studying here now.
Woman: Really? That's great! I found a job right after graduation. I'm in Changsha on a business trip now.
Man: How many days will you be staying in Changsha?
Woman: I just arrived yesterday. I estimate I'll be here for a week.
Man: Do you have time tomorrow? I can take you out.
Woman: Tomorrow is Thursday; I already have plans. I'm free the day after tomorrow.
Man: Okay, then the day after tomorrow. I'll first take you to Yuelu Academy, then to Orange Island. How about that?
Woman: Haha, I've heard about these two places a long time ago, I'm really looking forward to it.
Man: It's been about three years since we last met, right? I'm looking forward to seeing the class beauty.
Woman: What class beauty? I've aged badly. Where would be a good place to meet the day after tomorrow?
Man: How about 9 AM at the entrance of Fenglin Hotel?
Woman: Okay, see you then.
en_trans.query: When did the woman arrive in Changsha?

dialogue: 男：这照相机怎么坏了？打开就自动关机。

Woman: That's true, but you can buy them during sales, and it will be much cheaper.

Woman: There's a promotion next week, you can go and have a look.
Man: Okay, do you have time next week? Can you come with me?
Woman: I wish I had time, but unfortunately I'm busy with exams lately.
Man: Alright, I'll see who else has time.

dialogue: 男：田芳，你作业做完了吗?
女：做完了，怎么啦?

dialogue: 女：看小赵这身板，让他去帮忙是再合适不过了。

女：当然有，我还给她买了一条裙子。
Man: Why did you suddenly think of buying flowers?
Woman: Tomorrow is my mom's birthday, I want to give her a surprise.

Woman: Of course, I also bought her a dress.

dialogue: 女：我们得有十年没见了吧?你胖了很多，我都快认不出来了。
男：是啊，离开学校后就没见过了。我还记得离开学校时，你还哭了呢。
女：我那时真不想离开你们这些好朋友。

Woman: We haven't seen each other for about ten years, right? You've gained a lot of weight, I almost didn't recognize you.
Man: Yeah, we haven't seen each other since leaving school. I still remember you cried when we left school.
Woman: I really didn't want to leave you all, my good friends, at that time.
Man: Me too, I'm really happy to see you all now.

choices: She didn't want to leave her classmates
en_trans.gold: She didn't want to leave her classmates

dialogue: 男：你喜欢哪个季节?
女：冬天太冷了，夏天又太热了。春天不错，就是太短了。

女：秋天不冷也不热，风也不大，还很凉爽!
Man: Which season do you like?
Woman: Winter is too cold, and summer is too hot. Spring is nice, but it's too short.
Man: Then there's only autumn left.
Woman: Autumn is neither cold nor hot, the wind isn't strong, and it's very cool!
en_trans.query: What are they talking about?

男：应该会吧。好像是在一周之后。

Man: It probably will be. It seems like it'll happen in a week.

choices: The match will proceed as usual
The woman doesn't like watching matches

dialogue: 女：你画的这些画儿真漂亮!一点儿也不像业余爱好者画的。

en_trans.query: What is their most likely relationship?

No big problem in finishing on time

zh_trans.query: 关于女的，下列哪项正确？

dialogue: Man: Professor Wang, hello. You must be tired from the journey.
Woman: Not really, not really. Thank you for coming to pick me up at the airport. Have you been waiting long?
Man: No, your flight was on time. The car is outside. I'll help you with your luggage.
Woman: There's no need, no need to be polite. My bag is not heavy; I can manage it myself.
en_trans.query: Which of the following is correct about the woman?

dialogue: 女：我的男朋友要一米八以上，很有钱，长得帅，性格好，对我也好。
男：那你最好去梦里找。
Woman: My boyfriend must be taller than 1.8 meters, very rich, handsome, have a good personality, and treat me well.
Man: Then you better look for him in your dreams.
en_trans.query: What does the man mean?
choices: The woman's standards are very low
The woman's standards are very high
en_trans.gold: The woman's standards are very high

dialogue: 男：你今晚有什么安排?
女：没有，你有什么好的建议吗?
男：我听说公园里今天晚上有一场演出，我正好有两张票，你有兴趣吗?
女：好啊，我很喜欢看演出。都有些什么节目呢?
男：有歌舞、小品，还有京剧。
女：是吗?太好了!我五点四十下课，我们六点一刻在学校门口见面。
男：好，不见不散!
Man: What plans do you have for tonight?
Woman: Nothing, do you have any good suggestions?
Man: I heard there's a performance in the park tonight, and I happen to have two tickets. Are you interested?
Woman: Sure, I really enjoy watching performances. What kind of programs do they have?
Man: There are songs and dances, skits, and also Beijing opera.
Woman: Really? That's great! I finish class at 5:40, let's meet at the school gate at 6:15.
Man: Okay, see you there!
en_trans.query: What time are they meeting at the gate?

dialogue: 男：我看咱家的花都干了，我明天出差，你记得给它浇点儿水。
女：好，你不说我真把这事儿忘了，最近事情太多了。
zh_trans.query: 关于女的，可以知道什么?

dialogue: Man: I noticed that the flowers at home have dried up. I'm going on a business trip tomorrow, so remember to water them.
Woman: Okay, I would have forgotten if you hadn't mentioned it. There's been so much going on lately.
en_trans.query: What can be inferred about the woman?
choices: Going on a business trip tomorrow
Has taken good care of the flowers

dialogue: 男：你今天不用上班啊?
女：不用。
男：哦，我忘了今天是周末了。
女：跟周末没关系，我们9月28号才开学呢。
Man: You don't have to work today?
Woman: No need.
Man: Oh, I forgot today is the weekend.
Woman: It's not related to the weekend, we start school on September 28th.
en_trans.query: What is the possible date today?

dialogue: 女：您好，买点儿什么?
男：我想买双鞋，厚一点儿的，冬天穿。
女：你看看这双怎么样?这是现在最流行的。
男：嗯，这双样子挺好，颜色也不错，多少钱?
女：你如果能买，就给我200块钱吧!
男：好的，老板您可真实惠。我就要这双了。
女：别客气，我给你拿双新的。
Woman: Hello, what would you like to buy?
Man: I would like to buy a pair of shoes, a bit thicker, for winter wear.
Woman: How about this pair? These are the most popular right now.
Man: Hmm, this pair looks nice, and the color is good too. How much are they?
Woman: If you buy them, just give me 200 yuan.
Man: Okay, boss, you are really giving me a good deal. I'll take this pair.
Woman: No problem, I'll get you a new pair.
en_trans.query: Who could the woman possibly be?

dialogue: 男：你的自行车太旧了，该换辆新的了。
女：是，我打算周末就去买辆新的，你跟我一起去吗?
Man: Your bicycle is too old, you should get a new one.
Woman: Yes, I'm planning to buy a new one this weekend. Would you like to come with me?
en_trans.query: What does the woman want to do this weekend?

dialogue: 男：我要一杯咖啡。你喝什么?果汁怎么样?我记得你喜欢甜的。
女：我渴了，来一瓶矿泉水就行。
Man: I want a cup of coffee. What would you like to drink? How about some juice? I remember you like sweet things.
Woman: I'm thirsty. A bottle of mineral water will do.
en_trans.query: What does the woman want to drink?

dialogue: 男：刚刚想起来，下午去超市忘记给你买帽子了。
女：我也没想起来，下次吧。
Man: I just remembered, I forgot to buy you a hat when I went to the supermarket this afternoon.
Woman: I didn't think of it either, maybe next time.
en_trans.query: What does the woman mean?

dialogue: 女：咱们在这站下车吧，到学校正门下有点儿远。
男：还是到正门下吧。
Woman: Let's get off at this stop. It's a bit far to get off at the main entrance of the school.
Man: Let's get off at the main entrance.
en_trans.query: Where does the man want to get off?

dialogue: 女：这地方怎么这么冷?
男：你应该多穿点儿衣服。
女：昨天天气预报说今天是晴天啊!
男：但是现在是冬天啊。
Woman: Why is it so cold here?
Man: You should wear more clothes.
Woman: The weather forecast said it would be sunny today!
Man: But it is winter now.
en_trans.query: Why does the woman feel cold?

dialogue: 女：差一刻九点了，你动作快点儿!
男：急什么，离飞机起飞还有一个小时呢。
Woman: It's a quarter to nine, hurry up!
Man: Why rush, there is still an hour before the flight takes off.
en_trans.query: What time does the flight take off?

dialogue: 女：这个胡同里的房子看起来年代比较久远。
男：是，听长辈们说，这些房子都是十九世纪初修建的。
zh_trans.query: 关于那些房子，可以知道什么?

dialogue: Woman: The houses in this alley look quite old.
Man: Yes, according to the elders, these houses were all built in the early 19th century.
en_trans.query: What can be known about those houses?
choices: Belong to an ethnic minority architecture

dialogue: 男：这盘录像带才卖11块钱。可惜买了衣服以后，我只剩7块钱了。
女：我这里还有钱呢。你拿去用吧。
zh_trans.query: 男的觉得这盘录像带怎么样？

dialogue: Man: This videotape is only sold for 11 yuan. Unfortunately, after buying clothes, I only have 7 yuan left.
Woman: I still have money here. You can take it and use it.
en_trans.query: What does the man think about this videotape?

dialogue: 男：老师说大卫考试没通过。
女：怎么可能呢?他虽然常常生病，可是我们班上最好的学生。
Man: The teacher said David failed the exam.
Woman: How is that possible? Although he often gets sick, he is the best student in our class.
en_trans.query: What happened to David?
choices: Did not do well in the exam
en_trans.gold: Did not do well in the exam

dialogue: 女：你看，月亮在跑呢。
男：啊，还真是。
女：月亮为什么会跑呢?
男：月亮不会跑，其实是天上的云在动。
Woman: Look, the moon is moving.
Man: Ah, it really is.
Woman: Why is the moon moving?
Man: The moon isn't moving, actually it's the clouds in the sky that are moving.
en_trans.query: What is the weather like now?

dialogue: 男：这个周六你休息吗?一起去看电影吧。
女：最近医院特别忙，下周六吧。
zh_trans.query: 女的最可能是做什么的?

dialogue: Man: Are you off this Saturday? Let's go watch a movie together.
Woman: The hospital has been particularly busy recently, let's go next Saturday.
en_trans.query: What is the woman most likely to do?

dialogue: 女：今天你准备几点起床？
男：我不睡了，现在就起。
Woman: What time are you planning to get up today?
Man: I won't sleep anymore, I'll get up now.
en_trans.query: What does the man mean?

dialogue: 男：你看这里有各种各样的灯，多漂亮啊!
女：就是贵了一些，否则我们就买一个了。
男：喜欢就选一个吧，我今天刚发工资。
女：是吗?那我就不客气了。
Man: Look, there are all kinds of lamps here, how beautiful!
Woman: They're just a little expensive, otherwise we would have bought one.
Man: If you like one, just choose one. I just got my salary today.
Woman: Really? Then I won't hold back.
en_trans.query: What might the woman choose in the end?
choices: Buy a lamp with her own money
Buy a lamp with the man's money
en_trans.gold: Buy a lamp with the man's money

dialogue: 男：明天可是放假前的最后一天，还能开会吗？
女：明天再不开，哪天开呀？
zh_trans.query: 女的对明天开会怎么看？

dialogue: Man: Tomorrow is the last day before the holiday. Can we still have a meeting?
Woman: If we're not having it tomorrow, then when can we?
en_trans.query: What does the woman think about having a meeting tomorrow?

dialogue: 女：先生，等一等，您吃完饭还没给钱呢!
男：啊!对不起，我着急去上班，忘了付钱，我马上给。
zh_trans.query: 从上面的对话我们知道什么?

dialogue: Woman: Sir, wait a moment, you haven't paid after your meal!
Man: Ah! Sorry, I was in a hurry to go to work and forgot to pay. I'll pay right away.
en_trans.query: What do we know from the dialogue above?
choices: The woman is going to work.
The man didn't pay after his meal.
The man will come back to eat next time.
en_trans.gold: The man didn't pay after his meal.

dialogue: 女：请问你借什么书?
男：语文老师让我们多阅读名著。我想借一本文学方面的书。
女：这里有中国文学和外国文学，你对哪个更有兴趣呢?
男：还是中国文学吧。
女：对于刚刚开始阅读的人，《唐诗三百首》比较适合。
男：其实我还想读一读四大名著。
女：那个对你来说可能有点儿难。
男：那我还是以后再读吧。今天先借一本《唐诗三百首》。
女：好的，记住一个月以内来还书，不然就要多交钱了。
男：我一定按时还书。
Woman: May I ask what book you're borrowing?
Man: The language teacher advised us to read more classics. I want to borrow a book on literature.
Woman: There is Chinese literature and foreign literature here, which are you more interested in?
Man: Chinese literature.
Woman: For someone just starting to read, 'Three Hundred Tang Poems' is more suitable.
Man: Actually, I also want to read the Four Great Classical Novels.
Woman: That might be a bit difficult for you.
Man: Then I'll read them later. Today I'll borrow 'Three Hundred Tang Poems'.
Woman: Okay, remember to return the book within a month, otherwise, you will have to pay more.
Man: I will definitely return the book on time.
en_trans.query: What book did the man end up borrowing?

dialogue: 男：听说你在上王教授的课，感觉怎么样?
女：嗯，要是课前不喝一杯咖啡，很多同学都不能保持清醒。
Man: I heard you're taking Professor Wang's class, how do you feel about it?
Woman: Well, if we don't have a cup of coffee before class, many students can't stay awake.
en_trans.query: What does the woman mean?
choices: Didn't have a good rest at night

dialogue: 女：你跟经理提出我们的要求时，他怎么说?
男：他没有反应。
zh_trans.query: 经理对他们的要求有什么表示?

dialogue: Woman: What did the manager say when you brought up our request?
Man: He had no reaction.
en_trans.query: How did the manager respond to their request?

dialogue: 女：师傅，我的钱包忘在刚才去的商店里了，麻烦您把车开回去。
男：行，没问题。
Woman: Driver, I left my wallet in the store we just visited. Could you please drive back?
Man: Sure, no problem.
en_trans.query: Where is the conversation taking place?
